appraisal_events.evidence: « duc de Châtellerault était aussi froussard qu’imprudent »; il « s’était borné à se faire passer pour un Anglais » et répondait : « I do not speak french. »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator presents Châtellerault as timorous and imprudent, mocking his clumsy incognito and stressing that he is not an intimate of the salon.

status_effects.explanation: Locally, he is lowered by the account, which insists on his cowardice and ill-advised caution.
